_comment: ShibKart karts + world props. One clean object per prompt, plain background (image-to-3D hates clutter). Names match what the game loads: kart_standard/kart_sport/kart_heavy and props by name. Characters/Boshis come from BoshiCore, not here.
style_suffix: single clean 3D game asset, chibi cartoon kart-racing style, chunky readable silhouette, soft rounded forms with clean edges, bright saturated shiba-orange cyan and violet palette, glossy Mario-Kart-8 polish, centered, full object visible, plain flat neutral background, no ground, no shadow

assets.name: kart_standard
assets.prompt: a cute go-kart racing kart, standard balanced build, four fat wheels, empty driver seat, orange bodywork

assets.name: kart_sport
assets.prompt: a cute go-kart, low sleek sporty build with a rear spoiler wing, empty driver seat, cyan bodywork

assets.name: kart_heavy
assets.prompt: a cute go-kart, chunky heavy build with big chunky tyres and a roll bar, empty driver seat, violet bodywork

assets.name: item_box
assets.prompt: a floating glossy cube item box with a rainbow question mark on each face

assets.name: boost_pad
assets.prompt: a flat glowing orange chevron boost pad arrow panel

assets.name: tree_round
assets.prompt: a cute round stylized cartoon tree with a stubby trunk

assets.name: cactus
assets.prompt: a cute cartoon saguaro cactus
